Variables.Name: MovieScene
Variables.Description: Pointer to the movie scene that controls this animation.

Variables.Name: ObjectReferences
Variables.Description: Legacy object references - should be read-only. Not deprecated because they need to still be saved

Variables.Name: PossessedObjects_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Deprecated property housing old possessed object bindings

Variables.Name: DirectorClass
Variables.Description:
The class that is used to spawn this level sequence's director instance.
	  Director instances are allocated on-demand one per sequence during evaluation and are used by event tracks for triggering events.

Variables.Name: DirectorBlueprint
Variables.Description: A pointer to the director blueprint that generates this sequence's DirectorClass.
